subject: fix(theme): remove dynamic meta theme-color update from useDarkMode hook
body:
The brand color is constant — no JS update needed on dark mode toggle.
The HTML meta tag is the single source of truth. Removes dead code that
previously switched between background colors and was the root cause of
the status bar visibility bug.

Tags: pwa, theme, dark-mode, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch

title: remove dynamic meta theme-color update from useDarkMode hook
